title: Senior Software Engineer - Agentic AI
description:
Job Requisition ID #

25WD94321

Position Overview

Autodesk is embarking on an ambitious journey to create an
AI-first application platform that delivers a cohesive,
unified experience—redefining how users and internal teams
engage within an agent-driven workspace. This platform will
become the backbone of the next generation of design-and-
make software.

Join our forward-thinking team in Pune and play a key role
in building this next-generation AI-first platform.
Reporting to a Software Development Manager, you’ll
collaborate with some of the industry’s most talented
professionals and have the opportunity to:

- Explore, experiment, and grow with cutting-edge cloud
  technologies
- Build high-impact solutions used by millions worldwide
- Lead, mentor, and learn from others
- Drive strategic decisions with meaningful, long-term impact

Our team is dedicated to delivering seamless, AI-powered
experiences that empower everyone who imagines, designs, and
builds the world around us.

Responsibilities

- Collaborate with cross-organizational teams to design and
  build agentic workflows, developing and refining data
  models to ensure successful project delivery
- Utilize Python and other data manipulation languages
  proficiently to prepare and manipulate data
- Understand the business requirements and translate into
  solution design that successfully meets the business
  objectives
- Partner with product owners, software architects and other
  software engineers to iteratively turn high-level
  requirements into product enhancements that are delivered
  to customers incrementally
- Contribute to improvements in processes and deliverables
  that increase the effectiveness of the team in responding
  to customers and our needs

Minimum Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or a
  related discipline, or equivalent practical experience
- 5+ years of hands-on experience developing software using
  Python and/or TypeScript, with strong problem-solving and
  debugging skills
- Practical experience building and operating AI-enabled
  workflows on AWS, including services such as Amazon
  Bedrock, SageMaker, Lambda, CloudWatch, and API Gateway
- Solid foundation in machine learning concepts, including
  data mining, predictive modeling, and applied ML
  techniques
- Strong understanding of machine learning algorithms,
  development lifecycles, and the tools and platforms used
  to build, deploy, and scale ML systems
- Demonstrated ability to think critically and strategically
  to solve complex technical challenges

#LI-SB4

Learn More

About Autodesk

Welcome to Autodesk! Amazing things are created every day
with our software – from the greenest buildings and cleanest
cars to the smartest factories and biggest hit movies. We
help innovators turn their ideas into reality, transforming
not only how things are made, but what can be made.

We take great pride in our culture here at Autodesk – it’s
at the core of everything we do. Our culture guides the way
we work and treat each other, informs how we connect with
customers and partners, and defines how we show up in the
world.

When you’re an Autodesker, you can do meaningful work that
helps build a better world designed and made for all. Ready
to shape the world and your future? Join us!

Salary transparency

Salary is one part of Autodesk’s competitive compensation
package. Offers are based on the candidate’s experience and
geographic location. In addition to base salaries, our
compensation package may include annual cash bonuses,
commissions for sales roles, stock grants, and a
comprehensive benefits package.

Diversity & Belonging We take pride in cultivating a culture
of belonging where everyone can thrive. Learn more here:
https://www.autodesk.com/company/diversity-and-belonging

Are you an existing contractor or consultant with Autodesk?

Please search for open jobs and apply internally (not on
this external site).

ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves building AI-enabled workflows and agentic
workflows using Amazon Bedrock and SageMaker. The position
is focused on creating an AI-first platform with agent-
driven experiences, requiring hands-on development of AI/ML
systems rather than just support infrastructure.
